capabilities.description: Shipped instructions, templates, and target-facing docs that operators rely on directly.
Validation surfaces that check packaged workflows, templates, and related runtime contracts.
Repository scanning, framework detection, and evidence-backed recommendation output.
Spec flow state, recovery, and higher-level execution guidance.
Hook packaging, target runtime hook execution, and related operator guidance.
Doctor, audit, diff-install, upgrade, and other maintenance workflows.
Local-first diagnostic and effectiveness reporting surfaces.
